title: Brianc
compiled_truth: Brianc is an external contact at [Saltgrass](companies/saltgrass). Over the corpus period (2001-05-10 to 2002-06-24), Brianc sent 82 and received 65 emails, totalling 147 interactions. Top correspondents: [Wollam Erik](people/wollam-erik) (68), [Joe Parks](people/joe-parks) (36), [Chet Fenner](people/chet-fenner) (25), [Knipe Chad](people/knipe-chad) (17), [Corrier' 'Brad](people/corrier-brad) (9).
